name: subtext
label: Subtext
default: Our process is simple enough to explain in four steps and rigorous enough to trust with complex builds.

default.title: Discovery
default.description: We audit your current stack, review your goals, and map every technical requirement before writing a single line of code.

default.title: Architecture
default.description: We design the system — modules, data structure, integrations, and component hierarchy — and validate it with you before building.

default.title: Build
default.description: Iterative development in 2-week sprints with live previews, code reviews, and constant async communication.

default.title: Launch & Handoff
default.description: QA across devices, performance auditing, go-live support, and documentation so your team can own it confidently.
